health_conditions: prior broken back L3, L5, S1

benefits.description: Joint, tendon, and nerve issues mitigated severely

protocol_notes: 5/5 BPC157/TB500 mix. Mixing protocol: 100-200 units or 1-2mL bacteriostatic water into vials (2mL preferred for easier dosing). With 10mg total and 100 unit syringe: 10 units per dose = 250mcg per injection. Injection technique: alternate sides, ~1 inch from belly button, 45-90 degree angle. Injects 10 units air into vial first, then slowly retrieves liquid. Avoids directly hitting wafer to prevent vacuum suck. Gently rolls vial in hands until fully mixed. Mixes first vial immediately, keeps rest refrigerated, mixes next vial a couple days before running out.
